content.en:
After the Great Ghost River Secret Technique was practiced, Ye Tian could find the most Dao strange things in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

Xuanlin Mountain Boundary.

Ye Tian cast the Great Ghost River Secret Technique, and a strange fluctuation emanated, and he began to look for traces of strange things, and the sequelae brought by the Great Ghost River Secret Technique also appeared, and many cracks began to appear in his body.

This kind of crack will take a long time to repair later, and it may not even be completely repaired.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this damage at all.

Soon, he found a strange object.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over.

At this time, he discovered that the strange object of the Dao was hidden in an extremely hidden crevice.

And Ye Tian's arrival also made this Dao strange thing escape quickly, obviously sensing the danger.

However, Ye Tian had been tracking it, and the speed was even faster than it, so he naturally caught up with it easily.

"The most curious glass cup!"

Ye Tian recognized this kind of supreme curiosity.

This kind of supreme strange thing can release terrifying glazed supreme fire, which can incinerate everything, and its strength is not bad.

Rumble!!!

Endless glazed Dao flames burned in, trying to kill Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian just waved his gun, directly breaking through the sea of fire, and then shattered the Zhidao Strange Thing Glass Cup with one shot, causing the strange figure to dissipate in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian reached out and grabbed a fragment of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

"This piece of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragment is very good, much better than the previous ones!"

Ye Tian was quite satisfied.

Moreover, his current strength has reached the top fivefold to the Dao realm level, and it is naturally very easy to kill these supreme Dao strange things that are only equivalent to the top fourfold to the Dao realm.

Subsequently, he found another Dao Strange Object and easily killed it, thus obtaining another fragment of the Eighth Sequence of the Dao Strange Object.

In this way, Ye Tian's harvest became more and more, and the fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules accumulated in his hands naturally increased.

The problem now is that it will take a long time to use up so many fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, otherwise there is no way to use them up.

......

Taisu Battle City.

Ye Tian used his identity as the thirteenth day of Taisuwei to inquire about the information about the strange things of the Dao.

Taisu Palace's information must have been much more than he knew.

Soon, a bunch of information was obtained by Ye Tian.

At this time, he learned more about the strange things of the Dao.

The Supreme Dao Strange Objects were only born in the Nine Strange Lands in the Infinite Domain, and almost all of the Supreme Dao Strange Objects containing the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were in the Quadruple Dao Realm, and a few could reach the Fifth Rank Dao Realm.

However, since it was born in a strange place, and there is a standard for entering a strange place, it is extremely difficult to kill a strange thing to the Dodge.

And the strange objects of the Supreme Dao that contain the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, there is no doubt that the weakest ones are all in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and they are born in the first strange land, the second strange land, the third strange land, and the fourth strange land.

Only these four strange places gave birth to the supreme dao strange things that contained the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao.

However, these four strange lands are in the hands of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, but the Infinite Heavenly Palace cannot kill the Infinite Dao Strange Objects that contain the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao.

Otherwise, if you kill some of the strange things that contain the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, and obtain some more fragments of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, then if you let the powerhouses of the peak sixfold Supreme Dao realm with outstanding talent participate in the enlightenment, they will definitely be able to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, and they will be able to break through to the sevenfold Supreme Dao realm.

In that case, the Infinite Domain wouldn't be just a bit of a Dao Strange Thing.

If you want to kill a large number of Supreme Dao Strange Things, you can only do it by going to the Supreme Dao Realm of the Supreme Dao, but there are only a few people in the history of the Infinite Domain, and two of them have not grown up, and the other one has left the Infinite Domain early, so naturally he will not help the forces of the Infinite Domain to kill the Extreme Dao Strange Things.

Even if he kills the Dao Strange Things, he will only use them for himself like Ye Tian, and will not give them to other Dao Realms.

Of course.

The major forces have studied the Dao Strange Thing for countless years, and they also have the means to suppress the strength of the Dao Strange Thing, and for a long time, they have indeed killed the Dao Strange Thing that contains the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and obtained a small number of fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Moreover, after research and creation, they also created a formation built using the fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, so that they could comprehend the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules faster and more effectively.

There is such a formation in Taisu Palace-the Supreme Dao Strange Thing Array!

The Supreme Dao Strange Object Array is to use the fragments of the eighth sequence of Supreme Dao rules on the body of the Supreme Dao Strange Thing to combine to form a large array, so that people can perceive the higher and deeper Supreme Dao rules, and the effect of comprehension will be better.

For example, the Great Array of the Guiding Dao of Taisu Palace uses a fragment of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules as the core to induce the Ninth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to make people understand.

And this consumption is very small, so a fragment of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule can be used for countless years.

This is equivalent to using the fragment of the eighth sequence of supreme dao rules as a lead, which naturally does not consume much.

"To the Dao Strange Array, if you exchange it for battle merits, you need 200,000 battle merits. If you exchange it with the contribution points of the Taisu Palace, it will be 3 million contribution points, and if I join the Taisu Palace, I will only have 200,000 contribution points at the beginning, and I can't exchange this Dao Strange Array at all!"

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, it was better to use combat merits to make it more cost-effective.

It is very easy for him to obtain battle merits now, or it won't be long before he can collect 200,000 battle merits, and then he can exchange them for the Dao Strange Things Array.

After some time.

Ye Tian continued to attack and kill the Dao Void Demon, and he gained more and more combat exploits.

This made the Supreme Dao Void Demon side extremely angry, if they lost some Triple Supreme Dao Void Demons, they could afford to lose, but they lost a lot of Fourfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and occasionally lost one or two Fifth Rank Dao Void Demons.

They are not willing to accept such losses.

......

"Finally got together 200,000 battle exploits!"

Ye Tian came to the Taisu Battle Hall for the first time to exchange it for the Dao Strange Things Array.

Moreover, he is now the Heavenly Monarch of Tai Suwei, and it is easy to exchange it without any inquiry.

It didn't take long for the inheritance of the Dao Strange Array to be delivered.

Ye Tian accepted the inheritance as soon as possible.

The Dao Strange Array is extremely mysterious, otherwise the price would not be so high.

In the following days, Ye Tian silently comprehended the Dao Strange Array, and it took a lot of thought to understand the Dao Strange Array.

Xuanlin Mountain Boundary.

Ye Tian began to arrange the Dao Strange Array.

There are three ways to arrange the Dao Strange Array, the first is to use nine pieces of the eighth sequence to the Dao rule fragments to arrange the array, the second is to use twenty-seven pieces of the eighth sequence to the Dao rule fragments to arrange the array, and the third is to use the eighty-one pieces of the eighth sequence to the Dao rule fragments to arrange the array.

In fact, in the Infinity Domain, the latter two are deduced from the first and confirmed to be correct, but they are not actually operated.

"I've killed a lot of Dao Strange Things over the years, and I can arrange the third formation!"

Ye Tian decided to arrange the Dao Strange Array according to the third type.
